reason: The score and reasoning align well with broad fan and critical consensus. The OotP characterization critique, the loss of internal voice, the GoF gillyweed/Neville change, and the pattern of external fidelity with internal flattening are all well-documented and widely agreed upon. The 73/100 total feels slightly generous to some fans who consider Harry one of the more significantly altered characters (particularly his motivations and arc in HBP/DH), but the per-dimension breakdown with motivations and arc lowest is defensible. No factual errors found in the specific claims checked.
